name: Lemon Raspberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh/Frozen Raspberries (frozen raspberries should be without syrup and should not be thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, mix the vegetable oil and eggs until well combined.
4. Stir in the sugar and lemon extract.
5. Gently fold in the raspberries (ensure they are still cold if frozen) until evenly distributed.
6. Pour the batter into a greased muffin tin, filling each cavity about 2/3 full.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing them and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
